summary: 4 of 7 days known (9.015M), estimate total ~16.5M based on 4.5% YoY growth from 2025 Presidents Day week
content: Known: Mon 2/9=2,386,224; Tue 2/10=1,852,752; Wed 2/11=2,074,130; Thu 2/12=2,701,700. Total known=9,014,806. Missing Fri-Sun. 2025 comparable week (Feb 10-16) totaled 15,813,431. Average YoY growth Mon-Thu: 4.48%. DHS shutdown started Feb 14 early morning (minimal short-term impact). Monte Carlo median: ~16,495,000.
